name: agent-impact-detector
description: Detects when file modifications impact AI agent behavior. Warns when changes touch agent configuration, instructions, hooks, prompts, or context files.

agentConfig.label: Agent Configuration
agentConfig.description: Controls hooks, permissions, and custom instructions

agentInstructions.label: Agent Instructions
agentInstructions.description: Shapes agent behavior via project-level context

pluginScripts.label: Plugin Hook Scripts
pluginScripts.description: Executable hooks that run before/after agent tool calls

pluginConfig.label: Plugin Configuration
pluginConfig.description: Rules and thresholds that plugin hooks read at runtime

promptData.label: Prompt / AI Data
promptData.description: Files containing prompts, system instructions, or AI-related content

mcpConfig.label: MCP Server Configuration
mcpConfig.description: Model Context Protocol server definitions that extend agent capabilities
